# Copy this file to local_manifest.txt and adjust paths for private fixtures.
# local_manifest.txt is intentionally ignored by git.
#
# Format:
# id | type | visibility | tags | path | source_url

private-cd3-warped-tiff | tiff | private | tiff-metadata | ../../data_for_testing/test_BID_p480_CD3_warped.tiff |
private-he-tiff | tiff | private | tiff-metadata | ../../data_for_testing/test_BID_p480_HE.tiff |
private-cd8-cropped-tiff | tiff | private | tiff-metadata,tiff-tile | ../../data_for_testing/test_MF_CD8.cropped.tiff |
private-cd8-isyntax | isyntax | private | isyntax-metadata,isyntax-tile | ../../data_for_testing/test_MF_CD8.isyntax |
private-cd8-asap-xml | asap_xml | private | annotation-basic | ../../data_for_testing/test_MF_CD8.xml |
